Manager CW Bot
2.0.2

Methods and functions:

  • Installation lib, configuration and run the bot
  • Run the project
  • Analytics
  • Business
  • Information about last update
  • Run the project
  • Analytics
  • Business
  • Business handler for answers
  • Business handler
  • Buttons
  • Create Tables
  • Example of a bot.json file
    • Below is a sample code of the bot.json file.
  • MySQL Connector
  • Giga Chat AI
  • Giga Request
  • Get business connection and info conn
  • Giga Images
  • Giga Request
  • Giga Chat AI
  • Get business connection and info conn
  • Handler database and subscribe operations
  • Handler promo data
  • Handler successful payment
  • Handler refund
  • Handler send invoice
  • Tickets
  • Tests (UnitTest)
Manager CW Bot
  • Example of a bot.json file

Example of a bot.json file

Below is a sample code of the bot.json file.

 1{
 2    "BOT_TOKEN": "NUM_STR_TYPE",
 3    "update_id": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE",
 4    "business_connection": {
 5        "id": "STR_TYPE",
 6        "user": {
 7            "id": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE",
 8            "is_bot": "BOOL_STR_TYPE",
 9            "first_name": "STR_TYPE",
10            "last_name": "STR_TYPE",
11            "username": "STR_TYPE",
12            "language_code": "STR_TYPE",
13            "is_premium": "BOOL_STR_TYPE"
14        },
15        "user_chat_id": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE",
16        "date": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE",
17        "can_reply": "BOOL_STR_TYPE",
18        "is_enabled": "BOOL_STR_TYPE"
19    },
20    "GIGACHAT": {
21        "TOKEN": "STR_TYPE",
22        "AUTH_TOKEN": "STR_TYPE",
23        "ANSWER_SETTING": {
24            "TEMPERATURE": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE",
25            "TOP_P": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE",
26            "N": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE"
27        }
28    },
29    "MYSQL": {
30        "HOST": "STR_TYPE",
31        "USERNAME": "STR_TYPE",
32        "PASSWORD": "STR_TYPE",
33        "PORT": "INT-FLOAT_TYPE",
34        "DB_NAME": "STR_TYPE"
35    },
36    "BUSINESS_HANDLER": {
37        "THANKS": {
38            "THANKS_STICKER": "NONE",
39            "THANKS_TEXT": {
40                "MSG": "🙏 thanks",
41                "OFFSET": 0,
42                "LENGTH": 2,
43                "C_E_ID": "5285070644864628879"
44            }
45        },
46        "CONGRATULATION": {
47            "CONGRATULATION_STICKER": "NONE",
48            "CONGRATULATION_TEXT": {
49                "MSG": "☺️ Спасибо большое! 🙏",
50                "OFFSET": 0,
51                "LENGTH": 2,
52                "C_E_ID": "5427161992811004191"
53            }
54        },
55        "PROBLEM_WITH_BOT": {
56            "PROBLEM_WITH_BOT_STICKER": "CAACAgIAAxkBAAEBYCVmP0fUN7Ku4cFsiH8r5ao4G0-7HQACkEMAAt5q0UtcycYGwYpCCTUE",
57            "PROBLEM_WITH_BOT_TEXT": {
58                "MSG": "Здравствуйте! Принято. Сейчас начнём устранять проблему 🤖. Для начала, напишите Ваш EMail для связи с Вами и для разработчика (чтобы устранить проблему). Ожидаю.",
59                "OFFSET": 56,
60                "LENGTH": 2,
61                "C_E_ID": "5775888014119015271"
62            }
63        }
64    }
65}
